candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, not the total; less appropriate than the exact total line.
Current asset component, not the total; less appropriate than the exact total line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line for cash and cash equivalents.
Only unrestricted cash component, not total cash and cash equivalents.
Restricted cash component, not preferred for CHE when total cash and cash equivalents exists.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities on the balance sheet.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Would be a subtotal/component if populated, not as clean as the exact total.

candidates.why: Best match for current portion of interest-bearing debt; appears on balance sheet and excludes leases.
Could represent short-term debt if used, but appears unpopulated here and is less comprehensive than current portion of interest-bearing loans.
Potential STD component, but appears unpopulated in preview and may not exist across periods.

variables.notes: Chose the clean current debt total and excluded lease liabilities per instructions. The same label appears twice in the sheet preview, likely for different years under one label; included only once to avoid duplication.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Exact match for PPE on the balance sheet; preferred net/total PPE line.
Gross PPE total exists, but net PPE line is generally preferred when available.
Only a component/gross category, not as good as exact total PPE line.

variables.notes: Preferred the direct PPE line over the gross total because instructions favor total/net PPE.

candidates.why: Exact operating cash flow line on the cash flow statement.

variables.notes: Chose the exact net cash flow from operating activities label; this target had no shortlist candidate but identification is clear.
